description: The water will be shut off for repairs in an apartment building. The PM must notify all residents.

nodes.task_description: Draft a clear notice explaining the reason, date, and time of the water shut-off.

expected_outcome.value: A clear, concise notice is written.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all current tenants in the specified building.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls a complete list of resident emails and phone numbers for the building.

nodes.task_description: Send the notice to all residents via a bulk email and SMS blast.

expected_outcome.value: The notice is successfully delivered to all residents through multiple channels.
